name: bunq Partner MCP
description_en: Lets an AI assistant drive the bunq Partner API — onboarding, KYC, accounts, payments, cards, and compliance.

name: Mollie MCP
description_en: Lets an AI assistant manage Mollie payments, customers, invoices, subscriptions, balances, settlements, terminals, and webhooks.

name: Moneybird MCP
description_en: Lets an AI assistant manage Moneybird bookkeeping — invoices, contacts, and accounting data.

name: Simplicate MCP
description_en: Lets an AI assistant work with Simplicate's project, CRM, and invoicing data via a per-domain hosted endpoint.

name: Nmbrs AI Connector
description_en: Lets an AI assistant perform Dutch payroll actions in Nmbrs, with confirmation-gated writes.
